name: io.github.carson-see/arkova-verification
title: Arkova Verification
description: Privacy-first document verification anchored to the public ledger.

authentication.instructions: Get your API key at https://app.arkova.ai/settings/api-keys

tools.name: search
tools.description: Agent-friendly v2 search across organizations, anchored records, fingerprints, and documents.

tools.name: verify
tools.description: Verify whether a SHA-256 document fingerprint has been anchored.

tools.name: list_orgs
tools.description: List the organizations available to the authenticated caller.

tools.name: get_anchor
tools.description: Get redacted public anchor metadata by Arkova public ID.

tools.name: get_organization
tools.description: Get organization detail by organization public ID.

tools.name: get_record
tools.description: Get record detail by Arkova public ID.

tools.name: get_fingerprint
tools.description: Get fingerprint detail by exact SHA-256 hash.

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Get document detail by Arkova public ID.

tools.name: verify_credential
tools.description: Verify a credential's authenticity and current status by its public identifier.

tools.name: search_credentials
tools.description: Search for credentials using natural language queries with semantic similarity matching.

tools.name: nessie_query
tools.description: Query Arkova's verified intelligence engine over SEC filings, patents, and regulatory documents.

tools.name: anchor_document
tools.description: Submit a document SHA-256 fingerprint for anchoring to the public ledger.

tools.name: verify_document
tools.description: Verify a document by its SHA-256 fingerprint and get anchor proof.

tools.name: verify_batch
tools.description: Verify up to 100 credentials in one call.

tools.name: oracle_batch_verify
tools.description: Batch-verify up to 25 credentials with signed query-envelope metadata.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List AI agents registered to the authenticated caller's organization.

resources.name: api-overview
resources.description: Overview of Arkova's verification API, available tools, and authentication.

resources.name: credential-types
resources.description: Supported credential types, record types, and status values.

prompts.name: verify-credential
prompts.description: Look up and verify a credential by its Arkova public ID.

prompts.name: search-and-verify
prompts.description: Search with v2 aliases, inspect detail, and verify the top result.

prompts.name: anchor-and-verify
prompts.description: Anchor a document fingerprint and confirm submission.

prompts.name: research-topic
prompts.description: Research a topic using Nessie's verified intelligence engine.
